name: AbLang2
description: Generate embeddings, scan, or predict masked residues using antibody protein language model from paired sequences. Model optimized for predicting non germline residues.
capabilities: Generate embeddings, scan, or predict masked residues using antibody protein language model from paired sequences
Model optimized for predicting non germline residues

heavy_chain.description: Heavy chain variable region (VH) amino acid sequence

light_chain.description: Light chain variable region (VL) amino acid sequence. Use '|' separator between VH and VL for paired input

align.description: Whether to align residue-level encodings (applicable for rescoding mode)
